# Mitch Blyler - Mortgage Loan Officer

> Mitch Blyler (NMLS 2074110) is a licensed VA loan specialist and Mortgage Loan Officer at Presidential Bank Mortgage (Company NMLS 421593), licensed in all 50 states. He specializes in VA loans, military PCS moves, and down payment assistance programs, primarily serving Camden County, GA (Kings Bay Naval Submarine Base area).

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://linkwithmitch.com/): Overview of services, VA loan specialty, and military PCS expertise
- [About](https://linkwithmitch.com/about.html): Background, credentials, and personal story
- [VA Loan Programs](https://linkwithmitch.com/va-loans.html): VA loan eligibility, benefits, and process
- [Loan Programs](https://linkwithmitch.com/loan-programs.html): Full list of loan types offered
- [Military PCS](https://linkwithmitch.com/military-pcs.html): PCS mortgage guidance for active duty military
- [Down Payment Assistance](https://linkwithmitch.com/dpa-hub.html): DPA programs available in Georgia
- [Reviews](https://linkwithmitch.com/reviews.html): Verified client testimonials
- [FAQ](https://linkwithmitch.com/faq.html): Common mortgage questions answered
- [Contact](https://linkwithmitch.com/contact.html): Schedule a call or send a message
- [Apply](https://linkwithmitch.com/apply.html): Start a mortgage application
- [Free VA Guide](https://linkwithmitch.com/va-guide.html): Download the Ultimate Guide to VA Mortgages

## Blog Posts

- [PCS to Kings Bay](https://linkwithmitch.com/pcs-to-kings-bay.html): VA loan guide for military families moving to Kings Bay Naval Submarine Base
- [Two VA Loans at Once](https://linkwithmitch.com/two-va-loans-at-same-time.html): How to use VA loan entitlement for two properties simultaneously
- [VA Loan Benefit Multiple Times](https://linkwithmitch.com/va-loan-benefit-multiple-times.html): How veterans can reuse their VA loan benefit
- [VA Loans During PCS](https://linkwithmitch.com/va-loans-during-pcs-move.html): Using a VA loan while on PCS orders
